#  | Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Docs

> Build Elementor Loop Grids and Loop Carousels from rows stored in Secure Custom Fields (SCF) or Advanced Custom Fields Pro (ACF Pro).

- [Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/readme.md): Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor
- [Getting Started](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/getting-started.md): This quick start creates one Elementor Loop Grid from a top-level SCF/ACF Repeater. It is the simplest way to verify that the plugin, field group, and Elementor template are connected correctly.
- [Installation and Requirements](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/installation.md): Component
- [Free and Pro Features](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/features.md): This matrix describes the current 2.4 behavior. A check means the feature is implemented by the named edition—not merely that the underlying SCF/ACF field type exists.
- [Dynamic Tags and Field Types](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/field-types.md): Field support is determined by the dynamic tag you select. The plugin passes a value to an Elementor control; it does not manufacture a file card, gallery layout, relationship list, or other visual component.
- [Top-level Repeater Guide](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/usage-guide.md): This guide covers the stable, backwards-compatible workflow shared by Free and Pro: one top-level SCF/ACF Repeater rendered through an Elementor Loop Item.
- [Pro Features](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/pro-features.md): Pro extends the same Loop Item workflow instead of replacing it. Your Elementor template remains the source of the markup and design; Pro adds more row sources, contexts, tags, widgets, and interactions.
- [Pro Workflow Guide](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/usage-guide-pro.md): Start with the Top-level Repeater Guide if you have not built a basic repeater-powered Loop Grid yet. Pro uses the same foundation and adds specialized workflows.
- [Row Search and Sorting](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/row-search-sorting.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro 2.3 or newer.
- [Repeater Contexts](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/contexts.md): The Repeater context identifies the SCF/ACF object that owns the selected row source. It is separate from the Loop Item template and from Elementor's visual preview source.
- [Nested Repeaters](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/nested-repeaters.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Flexible Content Templates](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/flexible-content.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Relationship Queries](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/relationship-queries.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Taxonomy Filters](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/taxonomy-filters.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Repeater Lightbox](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/lightbox.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Loop Carousel](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/loop-carousel.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Repeater Display Conditions](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/display-conditions.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Repeater Form Options](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/form-options.md): Pro feature: Requires Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor Pro.
- [Compatibility](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/compatibility.md): Dynamic ACF Repeater for Elementor 2.4 declares these minimums:
- [Context Inspector](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/context-inspector.md): The Context Inspector is an opt-in, read-only report inside Elementor's Loop Grid and Loop Carousel sidebar. Use it while configuring or diagnosing a repeater-powered widget, then turn it off when you no longer need the report.
- [Troubleshooting](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/troubleshooting.md): Start with the smallest reproducible path: one populated source object, one Loop Item, and one Loop Grid. Confirm that works before re-enabling filters, lightbox, cache optimization, or aggregate queries.
- [Changelog](https://calculabs.github.io/elementor-acf-repeater-docs/changelog.md): This documentation tracks released plugin behavior. Versions are listed without invented release dates.
